name: Muffin Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Using a pastry blender, cut shortening into the dry ingredients until evenly distributed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a large, airtight container.
4. Label the container as "MUFFIN MIX" and store in a cool, dry place.
5. Use within 10 to 12 weeks.
6. This MUFFIN MIX can be used to make Melting-In-Your-Mouth Muffins, Apple Muffins, Molasses-Bran Muffins, Whole-Wheat Muffins, or Cranberry Cakes.
